Description: The next <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Adloquium<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Succor<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Indomitability<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, or <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Excogitation<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> executed will cost no MP or <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Aetherflow<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> stacks and will restore critical HP.

The next <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Adloquium<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow><If(Equal(PlayerParameter(68),28))><If(GreaterThanOrEqualTo(PlayerParameter(72),96))>Concitation<Else/>Succor</If><Else/>Succor</If><UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Indomitability<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, or <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Excogitation<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> executed will cost no MP or <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Aetherflow<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> stacks and will restore critical HP.

Name: Fusefield
Description: Deploying an infernal field.

Name: Damage Down
Description: Damage dealt is reduced.

Name: Honed Steel
Description: Potency of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Steel Fangs<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> and <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Steel Maw<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> is increased.

Name: Honed Reavers
Description: Potency of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Reaving Fangs<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> and <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Reaving Maw<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> is increased.
HP will be restored automatically when effect expires.
Damage taken is reduced and regenerating HP over time.

Name: Drone
Description: Wholly enthralled by Honey B. Lovely's charms and offering up life force as tribute.

Name: Infatuated
Description: Suffering minor heart palpitations due to a growing fondness for Honey B. Lovely. Taking damage over time.

Name: Head Over Heels
Description: Suffering heart palpitations due to an attraction to Honey B. Lovely. Taking damage over time.

Name: Hopeless Devotion
Description: Suffering severe heart palpitations due to undying affection for Honey B. Lovely. Taking damage over time.

Name: Honey Bee Mine
Description: Taken in Honey B. Lovely's thrall and suffering from a dangerously high heart rate, causing damage over time.

Name: ナーヴトキシン：前
Description: 神経毒により、方向感覚に異常が生じた状態。効果時間終了時、前方向に移動してしまう。

Name: ナーヴトキシン：後
Description: 神経毒により、方向感覚に異常が生じた状態。効果時間終了時、後方向に移動してしまう。

Name: ナーヴトキシン：左
Description: 神経毒により、方向感覚に異常が生じた状態。効果時間終了時、左方向に移動してしまう。

Name: ナーヴトキシン：右
Description: 神経毒により、方向感覚に異常が生じた状態。効果時間終了時、右方向に移動してしまう。

Name: Nine Lives
Description: Actions performed will be remembered.

Name: Beeloved Venom: α
Description: Honey B. Lovely's poison is causing damage over time, resulting in paralysis when this effect expires. Contact with specific poisons will trigger an explosion and remove this effect.

Name: Beeloved Venom: β
Description: Honey B. Lovely's poison is causing damage over time, resulting in KO when this effect expires. Contact with specific poisons will trigger an explosion and remove this effect.

Name: Poison 'n' Pop
Description: Poisoned by Honey B. Lovely. An explosion will be triggered when this effect expires.

Name: Queen Bee
Description: Strengthened by a drone's life force.

Name: Honeyed Charms
Description: Weapon has been lovingly coated with a pheromone-laced venom.

Name: Femme Fatale
Description: Significantly strengthened by several drones' life force.

Name: Concealed
Description: Unable to be detected from a distance.

Name: Chain Deathmatch
Description: Singled out for a deathmatch. Damage from opponent's first blow will be reduced; however, failing to receive a blow from said opponent before this effect expires will result in KO.

Name: Bombarium
Description: A highly combustible material has been affixed to the body, resulting in a KO when this effect expires. Contact with a sinister spark will trigger an explosion and remove this effect.

Name: Dangerously Doped
Description: A performance-enhancing compound is greatly amplifying physical strength. Damage dealt is increased based on the number of stacks.

Name: Doped and Detonative
Description: A cocktail of performance-enhancing compounds is amplifying physical strength to an explosive degree.

Name: One-two Memory
Description: Prepared to relive <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>One-two Paw<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.

Name: Four-crossed Memory
Description: Prepared to relive <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Quadruple Crossing<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.

Name: Rightward Memory
Description: Prepared to relive movement to the right.

Name: Leftward Memory
Description: Prepared to relive movement to the left.

Name: Four-swipe Memory
Description: Prepared to relive <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Quadruple Swipe<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.

Name: Two-swipe Memory
Description: Prepared to relive <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Double Swipe<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.

Name: Rotten Honey
Description: Honey B. Lovely is showing her true colors.

Name: Sustained Damage
Description: Sustaining damage over time.
